lines.english: It's me, Wang Peng, and Li You is here too.
Come in, come in, please come on in! Let me introduce you, this is my older sister, Gao Xiaoyin.
Hello, Xiaoyin. Pleased to meet you.
I'm very happy to meet you, too.
Your home is very big, and very beautiful too.
Is that so? Please sit down, please sit down.
I work at a school. What would you like to drink? Tea or coffee?
I'd like a bottle of cola, is that okay?
I'm sorry, we don't have any cola.
In that case, please give me a glass of water.

vocabulary.definition: (interjectory particle used to soften a question)

example_sentence.cn: 你看一下, 这是谁的照片?
example_sentence.py: Nǐ kàn yí xià, zhè shì shéi de zhàopiàn?
example_sentence.en: Take a look. Whose photo is this?
His younger sister is very pretty.

example_sentence.py: Nǐ hē yì diǎnr chá ba.

vocabulary.definition: a little, a bit, some [See Grammar 1.]

example_sentence.en: What would you like to eat?

example_sentence.py: Nǐ hē yì diǎnr chá ba.

example_sentence.en: Why don't you have some coffee?

vocabulary.definition: (measure word for things contained in a cup or glass)

database_items.original_text: Píng (measure word for bottled liquid, etc.)
Bēi (measure word for things contained in a cup or glass)
Gāo Xiǎoyīn Gao Xiaoyin (a personal name)
Your home is very big, and very beautiful too.
What would you like to drink? Tea or coffee?
standard_answers: 你们想喝点儿什么?喝茶还是喝咖啡?

database_items.original_text: I'm sorry, we don't have any cola.
standard_answers: 对不起,我们家没有可乐。

database_items.original_text: We are going to see a Chinese movie tomorrow.
standard_answers: 我们明天去看中国电影。

video_global_config.visual_style: 3D Pixar animation style, cinematic, vibrant colors, warm and inviting lighting, detailed textures, high-quality rendering.

character_definitions.name: 高文中
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A friendly Chinese male college student in his early 20s, with short black hair, wearing a comfortable grey hoodie and jeans. Expressive and welcoming.

character_definitions.name: 王朋
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A young Chinese man in his early 20s, friend of Gao Wenzhong, with neat black hair and stylish black-rimmed glasses, wearing a casual blue jacket over a t-shirt.

character_definitions.name: 李友
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: A cheerful young Chinese woman in her early 20s, with shoulder-length dark brown hair, wearing a fashionable yellow sweater and jeans. Curious and friendly.

character_definitions.name: 高小音
character_definitions.appearance_description_en: Gao Wenzhong's older sister, in her mid-20s. She is elegant with long, wavy black hair, wearing a cream-colored knit turtleneck sweater. Graceful and hospitable.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中听到门铃声，打开门，看到朋友王朋和李友站在门外，惊喜地打招呼。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Interior shot from a modern, cozy apartment. Gao Wenzhong opens the front door. Outside, his friends Wang Peng and Li You are smiling warmly. The lighting from the hallway spills into the apartment. 3D Pixar style, cinematic, eye-level shot.

voice_over.content: 谁呀? 是我, 王朋, 还有李友。
voice_over.pinyin: Shéi ya? Shì wǒ, Wáng Péng, hái yǒu Lǐ Yǒu.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高文中热情地邀请朋友们进屋，并向他们介绍自己的姐姐高小音。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Wide shot of a beautifully decorated, spacious living room. Gao Wenzhong gestures enthusiastically for his friends, Wang Peng and Li You, to enter. His elegant older sister, Gao Xiaoyin, stands up from a comfortable sofa to greet them with a warm smile. Natural light streams through the window. 3D Pixar style, cinematic.

voice_over.content: 请进, 快进来! 来, 我介绍一下, 这是我姐姐, 高小音。
voice_over.pinyin: Qǐng jìn, kuài jìn lai! Lái, wǒ jièshào yíxià, zhè shì wǒ jiějie, Gāo Xiǎoyīn.

screen_overlay.main_text: 请进 (qǐng jìn) / 介绍一下 (jièshào yíxià)
screen_overlay.sub_text: Please come in / Let me introduce

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 王朋和高小音互相问好。李友环顾四周，称赞房子既大又漂亮。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Medium shot focusing on Wang Peng and Gao Xiaoyin shaking hands and smiling warmly. The camera then smoothly pans to Li You, who is looking around the room with an impressed expression, her eyes wide with admiration for the decor. Soft, diffused lighting. 3D Pixar style, cinematic, shallow depth of field.

voice_over.content: 认识你很高兴。你们家很大, 也很漂亮。
voice_over.pinyin: Rènshi nǐ hěn gāoxìng. Nǐmen jiā hěn dà, yě hěn piàoliang.

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 高小音请大家坐下，并询问他们想喝茶还是咖啡。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: Gao Xiaoyin gestures gracefully towards the sofa, inviting Wang Peng and Li You to sit. She then walks towards the open-plan kitchen area, turning back to them with a friendly query. A teapot and a coffee machine are visible on the counter behind her. 3D Pixar style, cinematic.

voice_over.content: 请坐, 请坐。你们想喝点儿什么? 喝茶还是喝咖啡?
voice_over.pinyin: Qǐng zuò, qǐng zuò. Nǐmen xiǎng hē diǎnr shénme? Hē chá háishi hē kāfēi?

screen_overlay.main_text: 请坐 (qǐng zuò) / 喝 (hē) / 茶 (chá) / 咖啡 (kāfēi)
screen_overlay.sub_text: Please sit / to drink / tea / coffee

video_scenes.scene_description_cn: 王朋点了茶。李友想喝可乐，但高小音家没有，于是李友最后要了一杯水。
video_scenes.video_api_prompt_en: A dynamic sequence of close-ups: Wang Peng smiling as he requests tea. Li You looking hopeful asking for cola. Gao Xiaoyin's apologetic expression. Li You smiling understandingly and asking for water. Final shot of a glass of sparkling water being poured. 3D Pixar style, cinematic, focus on facial expressions.

voice_over.role: 王朋 & 李友 & 高小音
voice_over.content: 我喝茶吧。我要一瓶可乐, 可以吗? 对不起, 我们家没有可乐。那给我一杯水吧。
voice_over.pinyin: Wǒ hē chá ba. Wǒ yào yì píng kělè, kěyǐ ma? Duìbuqǐ, wǒmen jiā méiyǒu kělè. Nà gěi wǒ yì bēi shuǐ ba.

screen_overlay.main_text: 对不起 (duìbuqǐ) / 没有 (méiyǒu) / 一杯水 (yì bēi shuǐ)
screen_overlay.sub_text: Sorry / don't have / a glass of water
